inputs.prompt: Programme: 'Afternoon Edition' — mid-afternoon news-and-culture show, warm and engaged tone. Links needed: 1) INTRO LINK — opening at 2pm, top story is a new report on school funding cuts. 2) BRIDGE — moving from a music track into a pre-recorded interview with a local chef about seasonal cooking. 3) BACK ANNO — after a 3-minute package about a new youth theatre company.
Programme: Late night music show, mellow tone. Links needed: BRIDGE between two album tracks, the second artist is performing live in the city this weekend.

Programme: 'Europa Morgen' — a pan-European morning news magazine on a German public radio station, serious but accessible tone. Links needed: 1) INTRO LINK — 7am opening, lead story is EU summit on migration policy starting today in Brussels. 2) BRIDGE — moving from a correspondent report into a studio discussion with two policy analysts. 3) CLOSE — ending the programme before the 9am news.
